description: Returns an array calculated production rates across cost codes with an associated Budgeted Production Quantity

schema.description: Array of data calculations across budgeted cost codes

cost_code.description: Code and description of associated cost code

budgeted_hours.description: Number of labor hours budgeted for the given cost code

actual_hours.description: Number of labor hours logged for the given cost code to date

budgeted_quantity.description: Budgeted amount of a unit to install for the given cost code

actual_quantity.description: Actual amount of a unit installed for the given cost code to date

unit_of_measure.description: One of the following (ea, ls, lf, sf, sy, cy, mm, m, m^2, m^3, lbs, t, kg, ton)

production_rate_variance.description: Actual Production Rate - Budgeted Production Rate

sub_job_name.description: Name of the associated sub job

sub_job_id.description: ID of the associated sub job
